configurePresets.name: windows-base
configurePresets.description: Base settings shared by all Windows presets. Uses the default MSVC toolset (no override). CI compatible with GitHub Actions windows-latest (VS 2022 / v143).

configurePresets.name: windows-base-v180
configurePresets.description: Overrides toolset to v180 for Visual Studio Insiders 2026. Local use only — incompatible with CI (github Actions windows-latest only has v143). Use the *-v180 presets when you have VS Insiders 2026 installed.

configurePresets.name: windows-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Debug (MSVC x64) — D3D11 default + Vulkan optional
configurePresets.description: Builds engine_sandbox (D3D11 default, Vulkan optional) + Qt editor in Debug. Requires Qt 6. Vulkan SDK optional.

configurePresets.name: windows-release
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Release (MSVC x64) — D3D11 default + Vulkan optional
configurePresets.description: Builds engine_sandbox (D3D11 default, Vulkan optional) + Qt editor in Release. Requires Qt 6. Vulkan SDK optional.

configurePresets.name: windows-debug-engine-only
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Debug — Engine Only (D3D11, no Qt, no Vulkan SDK required)
configurePresets.description: Builds engine_sandbox with D3D11 backend. No Qt or Vulkan SDK needed. GT610-compatible. CI default.

configurePresets.name: windows-release-engine-only
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Release — Engine Only (D3D11, no Qt, no Vulkan SDK required)
configurePresets.description: Builds engine_sandbox with D3D11 backend in Release. No Qt or Vulkan SDK needed.

configurePresets.name: windows-debug-vulkan
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Debug — Vulkan backend (requires Vulkan SDK)
configurePresets.description: Builds engine_sandbox with both D3D11 and Vulkan backends. Requires Vulkan SDK installed.

configurePresets.name: windows-debug-v180
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Debug — VS Insiders 2026 (v180, D3D11 + Vulkan + Editor)
configurePresets.description: VS Insiders 2026 / toolset v180 variant of windows-debug. Requires Visual Studio Insiders 2026 installed locally. NOT for CI (windows-latest only has v143).

configurePresets.name: windows-release-v180
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Release — VS Insiders 2026 (v180, D3D11 + Vulkan + Editor)
configurePresets.description: VS Insiders 2026 / toolset v180 variant of windows-release. Requires Visual Studio Insiders 2026 installed locally. NOT for CI.

configurePresets.name: windows-debug-engine-only-v180
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Debug — Engine Only, VS Insiders 2026 (v180)
configurePresets.description: VS Insiders 2026 / toolset v180 variant of windows-debug-engine-only. D3D11 only, no Qt or Vulkan SDK required. Use on a machine with VS Insiders 2026. NOT for CI.

configurePresets.name: windows-release-engine-only-v180
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Release — Engine Only, VS Insiders 2026 (v180)
configurePresets.description: VS Insiders 2026 / toolset v180 variant of windows-release-engine-only. D3D11 only, no Qt or Vulkan SDK required. NOT for CI.

configurePresets.name: windows-debug-vulkan-v180
configurePresets.displayName: Windows Debug — Vulkan backend, VS Insiders 2026 (v180)
configurePresets.description: VS Insiders 2026 / toolset v180 variant of windows-debug-vulkan. Requires Vulkan SDK + VS Insiders 2026. NOT for CI.

buildPresets.name: windows-debug-engine-only-v180
buildPresets.displayName: Build Windows Debug Engine Only — VS Insiders 2026 (v180)

buildPresets.name: windows-release-engine-only-v180
buildPresets.displayName: Build Windows Release Engine Only — VS Insiders 2026 (v180)

buildPresets.name: windows-debug-vulkan-v180
buildPresets.displayName: Build Windows Debug Vulkan — VS Insiders 2026 (v180)
